zh.Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特哈德洛福
zh.Hillesley, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾希勒斯利
zh.Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英國巴金哈姆爾沃頓 安德伍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Haudlo於1339年6月5日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾沃頓 安德伍德時，她的父親Sir Richard Hadlow26歲，母親Isabella de St. Armand32歲。她於1358年2月之前與Sir Edmund de la Pole在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1369年7月在英國享年30歲。

zh-hans.Hillesley, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾希勒斯利
zh-hans.Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Engla: 英国巴金哈姆爾沃頓 安德伍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Haudlo于1339年6月5日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾沃頓 安德伍德时，她的父亲Sir Richard Hadlow26岁，母亲Isabella de St. Armand32岁。她于1358年2月之前与Sir Edmund de la Pole在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1369年7月在英国享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Haudlo was born on 5 June 1339, in Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Hadlow, was 26 and her mother, Isabella de St. Armand, was 32. She married Sir Edmund de la Pole before February 1358, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about July 1369, in England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Haudlo est née le 5 juin 1339, à Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Hadlow, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella de St. Armand, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edmund de la Pole avant février 1358, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ juillet 1369, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Haudlo am 5. Juni 1339 in Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Hadlow 26 und ihre Mutter Isabella de St. Armand 32. Sie hat vor Februar 1358 in Kent, England Sir Edmund de la Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um Juli 1369 im Alter von 30 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Haudlo è nata il il 5 giugno 1339 nel Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Hadlow, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabella de St. Armand, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edmund de la Pole prima del febbraio 1358, nel Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa luglio 1369, nel England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Engla: イギリスブクインガムシュアイアウオットオン ウンデルウッド
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Haudloが1339年6月5日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウオットオン ウンデルウッドで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Hadlowは26歳，母Isabella de St. Armandは32歳であった。1358年2月以前にイギリスケントでSir Edmund de la Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1369年7月にイギリスで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Haudlo(이)가 1339년 6월 5일 영국 벅잉함실르 보턴 운더우드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Hadlow(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella de St. Armand(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1358년 2월 이전 영국 켄트에서 Sir Edmund de la Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1369년 7월 영국에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.5 June 1339–about July 1369: 1339 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 5–ойролцоогоор 1369 оны Долоодугаар сар
mn.Hadlow, Kent, England, United Kingdom: Hadlow, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Haudlo nasceu em 5 de junho de 1339, em Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Hadlow, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de St. Armand, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edmund de la Pole antes fevereiro de 1358, em Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente julho de 1369, em Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Haudlo родилась 5 июня 1339 г. в местности воттон ундирвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Hadlow было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de St. Armand, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edmund de la Pole перед февраль 1358 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около июль 1369 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Haudlo nació el 5 de junio de 1339, en Wotton Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Hadlow, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabella de St. Armand, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir Edmund de la Pole antes de febrero de 1358, en Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente julio de 1369, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
